title: Escape from Impel Down: Rising Conflict
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Blackbeard, Whitebeard, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #1 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Blackbeard, Whitebeard, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #7, focusing on the immediate stakes of escape from impel down: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: So you can talk to fish...

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: I never thought you could call sharks...

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: About a fishman being friendly with fish?

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: I'll take that as a compliment

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: I'll let it slide for now.

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: We have only one objective right now....!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Wait, wait!!! You're a shichi- Buka!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's stranger that you didn't know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Sorry I didn't introduce myself earlier.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We didn't hear anything about this!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Why don't you guys just get off?

summary: This scene advances the Impel Down conflict through Blackbeard, Whitebeard, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #7, focusing on the immediate stakes of escape from impel down: rising conflict.
